name: chain_its_so_fking_hard_to_juggle_a_95_fami
method:
It's so fking hard to juggle a 9-5, family, and build a SaaS I'm Eusebiu, Dev for 8+ years, a dad, a normal WFH job.

And for some reason, I decided to start building my own SaaS.

Because hey, "why w

stages.task: Extract hook structure, emotional arc, and engagement triggers from the Reddit post format (raw honesty + specific numbers + named product + self-deprecation)
Generate 3 PRINTMAXX-voice versions: tech niche (building 337 scripts at $0 revenue), faith niche (building prayer apps as a side project), fitness niche (building streak apps while juggling life)
Schedule posts to Reddit (r/SideProject, r/SaaS, r/EntrepreneurRideAlong), Twitter, and LinkedIn
